opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have this non-stop, tickly dry cough that gets worse as soon as I lie down, and it's keeping me awake all night.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cough has gone on for about three weeks and I'm exhausted from no sleep — I've tried cough syrups and nothing helps.

symptom_narrative.onset: about three weeks ago, not long after I started a new blood pressure tablet
symptom_narrative.character: a dry, hacking, tickly cough — like a scratch or tickle at the back of my throat, no real phlegm coming up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's exhausting — the coughing fits are so bad they've made my chest wall ache and I can't sleep
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse at night and the moment I lie down flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — sitting up helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down flat makes it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the throat tickle and some aching in the chest wall from all the coughing; no fever that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had a cough like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm shattered from lack of sleep and worried I'll be unsteady on my feet at night

past_medical_history.how_managed: started on a new blood pressure tablet about four weeks ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new blood pressure tablet started about four weeks ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried the exhaustion makes him unsteady and at risk of a fall overnight

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff, not a calibrated clinic measurement

objective_data_offered.value: 36.6 C — no fever that I can feel
speaking in full sentences but interrupted by bursts of a dry hacking cough; looks tired but not distressed or blue

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home oximeter

objective_data_offered.value: several empty over-the-counter cough syrup bottles on the nightstand
